name: mixmlaal
description: 米小米拉阿狸 - 全球卓越的一站式多元化出行+本地生活生态平台

scripts.dev:driver: cd 01-前端集群/mixmlaal-web-driver-vue && npm run dev
scripts.dev:merchant: cd 01-前端集群/mixmlaal-web-merchant-vue && npm run dev
scripts.dev:admin: cd 01-前端集群/mixmlaal-web-react-admin && npm run dev
scripts.dev:api: cd 02-后端微服务集群/mixmlaal-node-api && npm run dev
scripts.build:driver: cd 01-前端集群/mixmlaal-web-driver-vue && npm run build
scripts.build:merchant: cd 01-前端集群/mixmlaal-web-merchant-vue && npm run build
scripts.build:admin: cd 01-前端集群/mixmlaal-web-react-admin && npm run build
scripts.build:all: npm run build:driver && npm run build:merchant && npm run build:admin
scripts.deploy: cd 05-部署运维层/mixmlaal-deploy-config && docker-compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml up -d
scripts.deploy:stop: cd 05-部署运维层/mixmlaal-deploy-config && docker-compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml down
scripts.deploy:logs: cd 05-部署运维层/mixmlaal-deploy-config && docker-compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml logs -f
scripts.deploy:status: cd 05-部署运维层/mixmlaal-deploy-config && docker-compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml ps
scripts.install:all: cd 01-前端集群/mixmlaal-web-driver-vue && npm install && cd ../mixmlaal-web-merchant-vue && npm install && cd ../mixmlaal-web-react-admin && npm install && cd ../../02-后端微服务集群/mixmlaal-node-api && npm install

author: MIXMLAAL Team
